description: A rigorous a-posteriori bound transferring the Galerkin spectrum to the full transfer operator is not included in current data. Labeling the gap as only a numerical observation is thus appropriate unless further error analysis is performed.
action_taken: A rigorous a-posteriori bound transferring the Galerkin spectrum to the full transfer operator is not included in current data. Labeling the gap as only a numerical observation is thus appropriate unless further error analysis is performed.
